steps.title: Use the contrast clue
steps.content: The sentence says blue holes and cenotes differ in several ways, so they are not usually viewed as being the same kind of thing. The “but” then explains that both are water-filled sinkholes formed by similar processes.

steps.title: Choose the similarity word
steps.content: Choice A means clearly different, which conflicts with “not usually viewed as being.” Choice B means explainable, and Choice D means mismatched; neither fits the shared-origin clue. “Analogous” means similar or comparable. The answer is C.
